308.name: Mountain Fortress
308.description: [Passive] All your Plant monsters gain +200 ATK/DEF. All your Machine monsters gain -150 ATK/DEF. All your Pyro monsters gain -100 ATK/DEF.

309.name: Dragon Realm

310.name: Mage Sanctum
310.description: [Passive] All your Spellcaster monsters gain +250 ATK/DEF. All your Beast monsters gain -150 ATK/DEF. All your Warrior monsters gain -100 ATK/DEF.

311.description: Equip to a Dragon monster. ATK +700, DEF +300.
